mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_code AS partnerCode, partner_name AS partnerName, partner_type AS partnerType, manager_name AS managerName, phone, address, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM partners WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY partner_id DESC

SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_code AS partnerCode, partner_name AS partnerName, partner_type AS partnerType, manager_name AS managerName, phone, address, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM partners ORDER BY partner_id DESC
